title: Gonimbus Index Hub Marker
description: Optional marker file at the root of an index hub. Identifies the hub version and provides human-readable metadata.

$schema.description: Optional schema reference for editor support

created_by.description: Tool and version that created the hub (e.g., gonimbus/0.1.8)

description.description: Optional human-readable description of the hub's purpose

provider_meta.description: Provider-opaque hints (e.g., GCS generation). Values are strings; keys are provider-specific.
